raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Hi! How are you?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Good, thanks for asking! How about yourself?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm doing pretty well.  I'm excited to be moving to a new city soon!

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Oh that's awesome! What city are you moving to?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm moving to Portland, Oregon.  I'm going to be pursuing my culinary dreams there.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: That sounds amazing! I love Portland.  I'm originally from there.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Really? That's so cool!  Do you still live there?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: No, I moved away a few years ago.  But I still visit my family there often.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: That's great.  Do you have any favorite places to visit in Portland?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Yes, I love going to Powell's Books.  It's the largest independent bookstore in the world.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: That sounds amazing!  I've never been to Powell's Books before.  I'm definitely going to have to check it out.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: You definitely should!  It's a really cool place.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Thanks for the recommendation!  I'm sure I'll love it.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: No problem!  I'm glad I could help.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Hey how are you doing?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Doing well, how about yourself?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm doing great! I'm a fulltime student studying radiology at a local college and I also play in a band that my parents don't know about.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: That's awesome! I'm a big fan of punk music myself, and I like to run and do yoga in my spare time.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Nice! I've been meaning to try yoga but I've never really had the time.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: It's really great for stress relief and it's a great way to get in shape.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'll have to try it sometime! What about your Impala?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: It's a 1964 Impala and it's in pretty good condition, but it needs a new paint job. I'm going to start working on that this weekend.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: That's awesome! I love classic cars.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Thanks! It's a lot of work, but it's worth it in the end.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm sure it will be!

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: So what's your favorite thing about being a student?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I love the freedom of being able to learn whatever I want.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: That's definitely the best part

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Hello there, how are you doing today?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Hi there, I am doing well, thanks! How about you?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm doing well, thanks for asking. What kind of things do you enjoy doing?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: I enjoy reading, cooking, and spending time with my family.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Reading is a great way to relax. I love to cook too! What is your favorite meal to make?

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: I love making chicken parmesan. I also love to make chocolate chip cookies.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Oh, those both sound delicious! I love chicken parmesan too.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Do you have any pets?

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I have a dog and a cat. They are my best friends.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: Aww, that sounds adorable. I used to have a dog, but he passed away a few years ago.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm so sorry to hear that. Dogs are such wonderful companions.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: They are. I miss him every day.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: I'm sure he misses you too.

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: I know he does.

raw_messages.speaker: User 1
raw_messages.text: Well, it was nice talking to you. I hope you have a great day!

raw_messages.speaker: User 2
raw_messages.text: You too! Thanks for chatting with me
